name: FUNDAMENTAL PAPER EDUCATION SURVIVAL (FPE:S)
description:
Heya~!

This bot was not planned. Чёрт меня за ногу дёрнул-

NOTE THAT ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18 YEARS OLD!

But not about that... There are literally all the students, all the teachers, Miss Grace... mhah. In theory, only Miss Circle, Miss Thavel and Miss Bloomie should attack, maybe other teachers will accidentally go crazy and decide too, but I hope this doesn’t happen, oops! Miss Emily, Miss Sasha and Mister Demi can help you get through the night somehow. Somehow. Somehow I don’t know how. About Miss Grace, well..... yes. just yes... (the next bot should be the same, but this time the good teachers will also attack, hahaha, yeeeaah....)

Fundamental Paper Education Survival (FPE:S)?? YES! WOOHOO....! [sounds of crickets] Jesus.

Ya can write comments, maybe something needs to be changed, maybe everything needs to be reconsidered and solve your problem (I will try my best, honestly!). Ya can even bite me for this, well... In principle, ya can give us ideas for bots, and I’ll create something for ya. Well then... I can wish ya good luck! There is a chance to get out. There is no danger here, don’t have to believe me! [interference] Ya know, the ∆lice, in theory, should leave the room on her own, and after some random student enters her room (this does not work on Oliver). However, at the moment I haven't really tested it, so I'm not sure about it... I'll change it as I test her output.

Happy Hunger Games! (literally)
creator: Ithaqua-qua
